description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with extensive use of large, grid-patterned glass windows on multiple sides, allowing for abundant natural light and visibility into the interior. The structure is primarily composed of white and gray materials, with a flat roof and a mix of solid and transparent wall sections. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a main entryway with double doors and arched glass above, and a visible staircase inside. The rear and side elevations showcase more glass panels, revealing interior furnishings and open-plan spaces. The building appears to have two main stories, with a rooftop area that may be accessible. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with large grid windows, a flat roof, and a mix of white and gray surfaces. The design is sleek and open, with a prominent garage and glass-heavy facades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, a large garage door, and extensive glass windows revealing the interior staircase.
description_view_1: Side/rear view dominated by solid white wall sections and minimal window openings, with the flat roof clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring expansive grid-patterned glass windows across both stories, providing a clear view into the interior spaces.
description_view_3: Side view with a mix of glass and solid wall sections, and partial visibility of the rooftop and interior furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large grid-patterned windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double doors, arched glass transom, and a flush, minimalistic design adjacent to a large garage door
